  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "DTI squirter washers not fully crushed, indicating bolts are not tensioned to the required minimum pretension."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Tighten the bolts further until the silicone media (squirt) is visible from the DTI protrusions as specified by the manufacturer, or verify gap compliance using a feeler gauge per RCSC Specification Section 8.2.4."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under the RCSC Specification, Direct Tension Indicators (DTIs) must be compressed to the point where the gaps are reduced to the specified refusal criteria (or when the silicone media squirts out for 'squirter' types) to ensure the bolt has achieved its required minimum tension. Uncrushed DTIs indicate under-tensioned structural bolts, which compromises the structural integrity of the connections.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 8.2.4"
  ]
}
